title: Grenfell Tower site: noise, dust and vibration monitoring reports - November 2025
body: "We are publishing noise, dust and vibration monitoring reports at the Grenfell Tower site for the period 3 November to 30 November 2025.    Noise monitoring report: 3 November to 30 November 2025   Dust monitoring report: 3 November to 30 November 2025   Vibration monitoring report: 3 November to 30 November 2025    If you would like a translation of these documents please email GrenfellTowerSite@communities.gov.uk. "
